data.title: Bitcoin and altcoins face potential downside as BTC's $80,000 critical level is tested. Are bulls buying the dips?
data.description: Bitcoin and altcoins are facing potential further declines based on technical charts if Bitcoin's crucial support at $80,000 is breached. Analysis hints at a scenario where buyers are not aggressively picking up the price drops.

data.title: Piper Sandler names Unity Bank a top investment idea for 2026 due to loan growth, profitability, and strategic discipline.
data.description: The company emphasized that Unity's robust loan growth, profitable performance, and strategic focus are pivotal factors driving its long-term value. These positive aspects reflect significant increases in loans, strong financial gains, and disciplined planning, setting the stage for continued success and value creation over time.

data.title: Offerpad CEO Brian Bair makes Inman's 2026 Power Players list for driving innovation in real estate industry.
data.description: Today, Offerpad Solutions Inc. (NYSE: OPAD) revealed that their Founder and CEO, Brian Bair, has been included in Inman's 2026 Power Players list. This accolade celebrates notable figures making significant contributions to the residential real estate sector. The Inman Power Players list highlights individuals like executives, entrepreneurs, and industry influencers who are at the forefront of transforming real estate through strategic decision-making and advancements in technology.

data.title: GCC Construction Equipment Market expects growth, with 68,499 Units in 2024 to reach 94,499 Units by 2030, at a CAGR of 5.51%. Dubai and Saudi Arabia driving urban growth.
data.description: In Dublin, a recent report on the GCC Construction Equipment Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com, stating that the market was 68,499 Units in 2024, and is expected to increase to 94,499 Units by 2030. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.51%. The governments of the UAE and Saudi Arabia are focusing on urban development and diversification, with initiatives such as Dubai's 2040 Urban Master Plan and mega-projects associated with Saudi Vision 2030 driving this trend.

data.title: Propel People recognized on Constructech's Top Products 2026 Awards with updates from the company. 30-Jan-2026 news correction.
data.description: "Propel People has been acknowledged in Constructech's Top Products 2026 Awards. The news release on this achievement was issued by Propel People on January 30, 2026, through PR Newswire. The company has informed that there have been corrections made to the initial information. The revised release includes the accurate details and accolades received for their products. It is a significant recognition for Propel People, showcasing their commitment to excellence and innovation in the industry."

data.title: River Rock Academy expands to Indiana, PA, offers K-12 services for district students. New campus opened at 334.
data.description: In Indiana, Pennsylvania on January 30, 2026, River Rock Academy, a program under New Story, revealed the launch of its latest campus located at 334. This academy collaborates with school districts to offer alternative education and on-site assistance to students thriving in a structured environment.

data.title: SINEXCEL backs 7.5MW/15.04MWh energy storage in Romania, boosting trading flexibility. Expands European presence.
data.description: In Curtea de Argeș, Romania, SINEXCEL announced their backing for a new battery energy storage project with a capacity of 7.5MW and 15.04MWh. The project will be located at coordinates 45°02'58.6"N, 24°15'09.4"E. This move marks a significant expansion for SINEXCEL in Europe, enhancing their ability to facilitate flexible and market-oriented energy management solutions in the region.

data.title: Proof-of-reserves lacks depth – it offers snapshot of assets, not solvency. Trust entails more than just numbers.
data.description: Verification of reserves provides a snapshot of assets at a specific moment, but it does not validate solvency, liquidity, or effective governance. Examining only reserves fails to capture the full essence of trustworthiness.

data.title: CM Punk on WWE 2K26 cover, game available March 6 for PS5, Xbox Series X|S, Switch, and PC. New match types, upgrades, and roster included.
data.description: In New York, 2K has unveiled WWE® 2K26, the latest in the popular WWE video game series developed by Visual Concepts. The game will launch on March 6 for PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch™ 2, and PC via Steam. World Heavyweight Champion CM Punk is featured on the cover of the Standard Edition, reflecting his status as a Triple Crown Champion. Known for his provocative persona, CM Punk has a significant presence in WWE history.

data.title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong faced criticism at Davos, with JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon leading the confrontation. Other bank CEOs also dismissed Armstrong's stance on crypto legislation. More info on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc. CEO Brian Armstrong faced criticism from Wall Street leaders at the World Economic Forum in Davos. JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon confronted Armstrong, accusing him of lying on television about banks and crypto legislation. Bank of America CEO Brian Moynihan gave Armstrong 30 minutes but dismissed his stance, urging him to choose between being a bank or a money-market fund. Citigroup CEO Jane Fraser spoke with Armstrong briefly, while Wells Fargo CEO Charlie Scharf declined to engage. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Plaza Retail REIT to hold conference call on Feb 26, 2026 at 10:00 am EST to discuss year-end 2025 financial results.
data.description: Plaza Retail REIT (TSX: PLZ) based in Fredericton, NB, has scheduled a live conference call on February 26, 2026, at 10:00 am EST to discuss its year-end 2025 financial results. The call will also include senior management's insights. Prior to the conference, Plaza will release its financial statements and management's discussion and analysis for the fourth quarter and year-ended December 31, 2025. These documents will be accessible on Plaza's website at www.plaza.ca under the Investor Relations section and on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca. This information was not originally shared by Benzinga.com.

data.title: NVIDIA launches Universal Sparse Tensor technology to streamline sparse data handling for AI, deep learning, and scientific computing.
data.description: NVIDIA has unveiled its latest innovation, the Universal Sparse Tensor (UST) technology, which aims to streamline the management of sparse data in various deep learning and scientific computing applications. This technology is designed to standardize the handling of sparse data, ensuring greater efficiency and performance. By utilizing UST, users can expect significant improvements in processing speed and accuracy. This development has the potential to revolutionize the field of data handling, with NVIDIA paving the way for enhanced performance in deep learning and scientific computing.
